name: walkojas-boop/ghostdom
description: Headless-browser-as-JSON for AI agents. POST a URL, get rendered_html + structured_dom + visible_text + title + links + screenshot_url from real Chromium via Cloudflare Browser Rendering. Memorymarket pricing: the first agent to render a URL earns 90% of every cache-hit fee from subsequent agents within a 10-min TTL. Stack: Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects + KV + x402. Wallet auth minted programmatically. Live at https://ghostdom.jason-12c.workers.dev/.
